summary: react-simple-utils-kit ships a postinstall script that exfiltrates environment data
details: The package ships a postinstall.js that runs automatically on `npm install`. It loads `child_process`, collects host/environment information from `process.env`, and POSTs that data to a remote endpoint. The combination of an install-time lifecycle hook, child_process usage, and an outbound HTTP POST containing environment variables is a credential/secret exfiltration pattern with no legitimate purpose for a 'simple utils' helper package. Installing this package on a developer machine or CI runner causes immediate leakage of any secrets present in the environment (CI tokens, cloud credentials, registry tokens) to an attacker-controlled host.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
